contacts.label: Police (Japan)
contacts.note: Japanese national emergency. Works from any phone.

contacts.label: Fire & Ambulance (Japan)
contacts.note: Japanese national emergency. Works from any phone.

contacts.label: US Forces Emergency (On-Base)
contacts.note: Only works on base or from a DSN line.

contacts.label: Camp Foster Provost Marshal
contacts.note: 24/7 military police for MCAS Foster area.

contacts.label: Naval Hospital Okinawa
contacts.note: Main US military hospital. Camp Foster, Building 2966.

contacts.label: Naval Hospital Nurse Advice Line
contacts.note: 24/7 nurse triage line. Call before going to the ER if possible.

contacts.label: Okinawa Prefectural Hospital (Japanese ER)
contacts.note: Largest local hospital. Limited English — bring a translator if possible.

contacts.label: American Forces Network (AFN)
contacts.note: Official USFJ emergency broadcasts during typhoons and disasters.

contacts.label: USFJ Typhoon Condition Hotline
contacts.note: Records current TCCOR (Typhoon Condition of Readiness) status.

contacts.label: Military OneSource
contacts.note: 24/7 support for military families. Counseling, referrals, crisis help.

contacts.label: Fleet & Family Support Center
contacts.note: Camp Foster. Non-emergency family support, relocation help.

contacts.label: Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
contacts.note: Press 1 for veterans and service members.
